news.t: A Roundup of June's Most Notable ETF Launches
Tuttle's New HBMX Targets Memory Semiconductor Ecosystem
The Stack Behind the Stack: Tuttle Capital Launches Concentrated Memory Stack ETF (HBMX)

holdings.infoBox: HBMX is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are Onto Innovation stock at 9.10%, Micron Technology at 8.62%, Applied Materials at 7.88%, Advantest at 7.61%, and OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES at 7.07%.

overview.description: The Tuttle Capital Concentrated Memory Stack ETF (HBMX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is an actively managed thematic ETF focused on memory semiconductor companies supporting AI, data centers, and advanced computing. HBMX was launched on Jun 2, 2026 and is issued by Tuttle Capital.
